title: Lyra-1 Tokenizer Encoder/Decoder Modules

enums.name: Encoder3DType
enums.note: Maps to 3D encoder variants from layers3d

enums.name: Decoder3DType
enums.note: Maps to 3D decoder variants from layers3d

enums.name: ContinuousFormulation
enums.note: Selects distribution for continuous tokenizer (VAE vs AE)

enums.name: DiscreteQuantizer
enums.note: Selects quantizer type for discrete tokenizer

classes_2d.name: Encoder
classes_2d.constructor_params: in_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels, spatial_compression
classes_2d.forward: x -> patcher -> conv_in -> down[ResnetBlock+Downsample] -> mid[ResnetBlock+AttnBlock] -> norm_out -> conv_out -> z

classes_2d.name: Decoder
classes_2d.constructor_params: out_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels, spatial_compression
classes_2d.forward: z -> conv_in -> mid[ResnetBlock+AttnBlock] -> up[ResnetBlock+Upsample] -> norm_out -> conv_out -> unpatcher -> x

classes_2d.name: ResnetBlock
classes_2d.forward: x -> norm1 -> silu -> conv1 -> norm2 -> silu -> dropout -> conv2 + shortcut(x)

classes_2d.name: AttnBlock
classes_2d.forward: x -> norm -> q/k/v projections -> bmm attention -> proj_out + residual

classes_3d.name: EncoderBase
classes_3d.constructor_params: in_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels
classes_3d.forward: x -> patcher3d(2D Patcher frame-wise) -> conv_in -> down[CausalResnetBlock3d+CausalDownsample3d or avg_pool3d temporal] -> mid -> norm_out -> conv_out
classes_3d.note: Spatial patcher applied frame-by-frame (time2batch/batch2time). Last level uses avg_pool3d temporal downsampling.

classes_3d.name: DecoderBase
classes_3d.constructor_params: out_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels
classes_3d.forward: z -> conv_in -> mid -> up[CausalResnetBlock3d+CausalUpsample3d or repeat_interleave temporal] -> norm_out -> conv_out -> unpatcher3d

classes_3d.name: EncoderFactorized
classes_3d.constructor_params: in_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels, spatial_compression=16, temporal_compression=8
classes_3d.forward: x -> patcher3d -> conv_in(factorized) -> down[CausalResnetBlockFactorized3d+CausalHybridDownsample3d] -> mid -> norm_out -> conv_out(factorized)
classes_3d.note: Factorized spatial+temporal (1,3,3)+(3,1,1) conv. num_spatial_downs and num_temporal_downs computed from compression ratios.

classes_3d.name: DecoderFactorized
classes_3d.constructor_params: out_channels, channels, channels_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_resolutions, dropout, resolution, z_channels, spatial_compression=16, temporal_compression=8

classes_3d.name: DecoderFactorizedVanilla
classes_3d.note: Variant of DecoderFactorized (Vanilla = no patching or minor differences, line 968)

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalConv3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.note: Causal 3D conv with separate time_stride/time_dilation parameters

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalResnetBlock3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> norm1 -> silu -> conv1 -> norm2 -> silu -> dropout -> conv2 + shortcut(x)

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalResnetBlockFactorized3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> norm1 -> silu -> conv1(factorized) -> norm2 -> silu -> dropout -> conv2(factorized) + shortcut
classes_3d_building_blocks.note: Factorized spatial(1,3,3) + temporal(3,1,1) convs instead of full 3x3x3

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalAttnBlock
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> norm -> q/k/v -> time2batch -> spatial attention (bmm) -> batch2time -> proj_out + residual

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalTemporalAttnBlock
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> norm -> q/k/v -> space2batch -> causal temporal attention(tril mask+bmm) -> batch2space -> proj_out + residual
classes_3d_building_blocks.note: Temporal self-attention with causal mask, applied per-spatial-location

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalUpsample3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> repeat_interleave(2, spatial dims) + temporal repeat -> conv -> trim first frames

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalHybridUpsample3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> optional temporal repeat+conv1+residual -> optional spatial repeat+conv2+residual -> conv3

classes_3d_building_blocks.name: CausalHybridDownsample3d
classes_3d_building_blocks.forward: x -> optional spatial(conv1+avg_pool3d) -> optional temporal(conv2+avg_pool3d) -> conv3

classes_distributions.name: GaussianDistribution
classes_distributions.note: VAE reparameterization: splits parameters into mean+logvar, clamps logvar, samples

classes_distributions.name: IdentityDistribution
classes_distributions.note: AE pass-through: no distribution, returns zeros for KL loss terms

classes_quantizers.name: VectorQuantizer
methods: forward(z): (z_q, loss, (indices, min_encs, commit_loss, emb_loss, perplexity))
classes_quantizers.forward_note: z (b,c,h,w) -> flatten -> L2 nearest neighbor in codebook -> z_q -> commitment+embedding loss

classes_quantizers.name: LFQuantizer
classes_quantizers.forward_note: z -> project_in -> sign quantization (z_q = sign(z)) -> straight-through gradient -> commit_loss + optional entropy_loss

classes_quantizers.name: ResidualFSQuantizer
classes_quantizers.forward_note: Stacks N FSQuantizers; each quantizes residual of previous. Returns stacked indices dim=1.

classes_quantizers.name: InvQuantizerJit
classes_quantizers.note: JIT-traceable wrapper for decoder-side index->code lookup

classes_patching.name: Patcher
classes_patching.note: 2D image patcher: haar wavelet or rearrange. Non-trainable (no grad).

classes_patching.name: Patcher3D
classes_patching.note: 3D video patcher inheriting from Patcher. Overrides _dwt with 3D conv.

classes_utils.name: CausalNormalize
classes_utils.forward: if num_groups==1: time2batch -> GroupNorm -> batch2time (causal); else: GroupNorm directly
classes_utils.note: num_groups=1 -> LayerNorm-like causal behavior; num_groups=32 -> legacy GroupNorm

utility_functions: batch2space(x, batch_size, height): reverse of space2batch
replication_pad(x): prepend first frame to temporal dim
round_ste(z): round with straight-through estimator gradient
key_relationships: EncoderType(Enum) references Encoder (2D)
DecoderType(Enum) references Decoder (2D)
Encoder3DType(Enum) references EncoderBase, EncoderFactorized
Decoder3DType(Enum) references DecoderBase, DecoderFactorized, DecoderFactorizedVanilla, DecoderBaseVanilla
ContinuousFormulation(Enum) references GaussianDistribution, IdentityDistribution
DiscreteQuantizer(Enum) references VectorQuantizer, LFQuantizer, FSQuantizer, ResidualFSQuantizer
Encoder composes Patcher, ResnetBlock, AttnBlock, Downsample
Decoder composes UnPatcher, ResnetBlock, AttnBlock, Upsample
EncoderBase composes Patcher(2D, frame-wise), CausalConv3d, CausalResnetBlock3d, CausalAttnBlock, CausalDownsample3d
DecoderBase composes UnPatcher(2D, frame-wise), CausalConv3d, CausalResnetBlock3d, CausalAttnBlock, CausalUpsample3d
EncoderFactorized composes Patcher3D, CausalResnetBlockFactorized3d, CausalAttnBlock, CausalTemporalAttnBlock, CausalHybridDownsample3d
DecoderFactorized composes UnPatcher3D, CausalResnetBlockFactorized3d, CausalAttnBlock, CausalTemporalAttnBlock, CausalHybridUpsample3d
ResidualFSQuantizer composes FSQuantizer (list of N layers)
InvQuantizerJit wraps FSQuantizer or LFQuantizer
CausalConv3d uses nn.Conv3d + custom causal time padding
CausalResnetBlock3d composes CausalConv3d, CausalNormalize
CausalResnetBlockFactorized3d composes CausalConv3d (factorized), CausalNormalize
CausalAttnBlock composes CausalConv3d(1x1x1 qkv), uses time2batch/batch2time
CausalTemporalAttnBlock composes CausalConv3d(1x1x1 qkv), uses space2batch/batch2space + causal mask
Patcher3D inherits Patcher (overrides _dwt for 3D)
UnPatcher3D inherits UnPatcher (overrides _idwt for 3D)
CausalNormalize uses time2batch/batch2time for causal GroupNorm
important_notes: All 3D classes use CausalConv3d which pads temporally by replicating first frame (not future). EncoderFactorized/DecoderFactorized use factorized (1,3,3)+(3,1,1) convolutions for spatial/temporal separation, and Patcher3D for 3D wavelet patching. EncoderBase/DecoderBase use full CausalConv3d with 2D spatial patcher applied frame-by-frame. ContinuousFormulation enum selects between VAE (GaussianDistribution, KL divergence) and AE (IdentityDistribution, no KL). DiscreteQuantizer offers VQ (codebook lookup), LFQ (sign/bit-flip), FSQ (finite scalar), and ResidualFSQ (stacked FSQ). The Vanilla variants (DecoderFactorizedVanilla, DecoderBaseVanilla) are alternative decoder architectures at lines 968 and 1111 of layers3d.py.
